Table CP Recipe Price Fluctuation - Field Fixed By - Property Caption
Table CP Recipe Price Fluctuation - Field Fixed Date - Property Caption

Table CP Recipe Price Fluctuation - Field Item No. - Property Caption
Table CP Recipe Price Fluctuation - Field Item No. Series - Property Caption
Table CP Recipe Price Fluctuation - Field Notification Sent - Property Caption
Table CP Recipe Price Fluctuation - Field Previous Standard Cost - Property Caption
Table CP Recipe Price Fluctuation - Field Recipe Fixed - Property Caption
Table CP Recipe Price Fluctuation - Field Recipe Lot - Property Caption
Table CP Recipe Price Fluctuation - Field Statistics Lot - Property Caption
Table CP Recipe Price Fluctuation - Field Statistics Lot UoM - Property Caption

Table Fluctuation Recipient - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the email address for the fluctuation notification recipient.
trans-unit.note: Table Fluctuation Recipient - Field Email Address - Property ToolTip
Table Fluctuation Recipient - Field Email Address - Property Caption
Table Fluctuation Recipient - Field Entry No. - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether the email sent to this recipient includes cost details (previous cost, new cost, fluctuation) or only item code and description.
trans-unit.note: Table Fluctuation Recipient - Field Include Costs - Property ToolTip
Table Fluctuation Recipient - Field Include Costs - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether this recipient receives PT (production), CA (catering), or Error notifications.
trans-unit.note: Table Fluctuation Recipient - Field Recipient Type - Property ToolTip
Table Fluctuation Recipient - Field Recipient Type - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Recalculando costes y enviando notificación para %1...\Por favor, espere.
trans-unit.note: %1 = Item No.
Codeunit CP AlxModCosteEstandar Events - NamedType ProcessingMsgLbl
Codeunit CP Recipe Fluctuation Mgt - NamedType ConsolidatedEmailSubjectLbl
%1 = Trigger source description
Codeunit CP Recipe Fluctuation Mgt - NamedType EmailOriginLbl

trans-unit.source: The email notification could not be sent. The process will continue.\Error: %1
trans-unit.note: %1 = Error message
Codeunit CP Recipe Fluctuation Mgt - NamedType EmailSendFailedMsg
%1 = Fluctuation amount, %2 = Fluctuation percentage
Codeunit CP Recipe Fluctuation Mgt - NamedType EmailTdFluctuationLbl
%1 = Cell value
Codeunit CP Recipe Fluctuation Mgt - NamedType EmailTdLbl
%1 = Previous cost, %2 = Current cost
Codeunit CP Recipe Fluctuation Mgt - NamedType EmailTriggerCostLbl

trans-unit.source:
Recipe Cost Calculation Errors

The following recipes had errors during cost recalculation:

%1
trans-unit.note: %1 = List of items with errors
Codeunit CP Recipe Fluctuation Mgt - NamedType ErrorEmailBodyLbl
Codeunit CP Recipe Fluctuation Mgt - NamedType ErrorEmailSubjectLbl

trans-unit.source: No email account is configured in Recipe Fluctuation Setup. Please select an email account.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit CP Recipe Fluctuation Mgt - NamedType NoEmailAccountConfiguredErr

trans-unit.source: Proceso automático de todas las recetas
trans-unit.note: Codeunit CP Recipe Fluctuation Mgt - NamedType TriggerAllRecipesLbl
%1 = Item No., %2 = Item Description
Codeunit CP Recipe Fluctuation Mgt - NamedType TriggerItemCostChangedLbl
%1 = Item No., %2 = Item Description
Codeunit CP Recipe Fluctuation Mgt - NamedType TriggerRawMaterialLbl
%1 = Item No.
Codeunit CP Recipe Fluctuation Mgt - NamedType TriggerRawMaterialNoDescLbl
%1 = Old Item No., %2 = Old Description, %3 = New Item No., %4 = New Description, %5 = Parent Item No.
Codeunit CP Recipe Fluctuation Mgt - NamedType TriggerSubstitutionLbl

trans-unit.source: Do you want to activate product %1 and change its number to %2, including all its BOM components?
trans-unit.note: %1 = Old Item No., %2 = New Item No.
Codeunit Item Management - NamedType ConfirmActivateQst

trans-unit.source: Warning: A new item reference will be created as a copy of the current one. Are you sure?
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Item Management - NamedType ConfirmDuplicateQst
%1 = Item No., %2 = Item Description
Codeunit Item Management - NamedType EmailSubjectLbl

trans-unit.source: Product %1 has been activated and renumbered to %2. All components have been activated successfully.
trans-unit.note: %1 = Old Item No., %2 = New Item No.
Codeunit Item Management - NamedType ProductActivatedMsg

trans-unit.source: This product is already active or does not have a DES-MA, DES-MP, or DES-PT prefix. It cannot be activated again.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Item Management - NamedType ProductAlreadyActiveErr
Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Property Caption
Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control Information - Property Caption
Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control FixedCost - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the fixed total cost of the bill of materials.
trans-unit.note: Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control FixedBOMTotalCost - Property ToolTip
Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control FixedBOMTotalCost - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the fixed EXWORK standard price.
trans-unit.note: Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control FixedExworkStdCost - Property ToolTip
Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control FixedExworkStdCost - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the fixed general costs excluding profit.
trans-unit.note: Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control FixedGeneralCosts - Property ToolTip
Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control FixedGeneralCosts - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the profit calculated on the fixed cost.
trans-unit.note: Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control FixedProfit - Property ToolTip
Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control FixedProfit - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the profit percentage on the fixed cost.
trans-unit.note: Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control FixedProfitPct - Property ToolTip
Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control FixedProfitPct - Property Caption
Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control ProductCost - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the total BOM cost calculated from product standard costs.
trans-unit.note: Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control ProductBOMTotalCost - Property ToolTip
Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control ProductBOMTotalCost - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the EXWORK standard price calculated from product standard costs.
trans-unit.note: Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control ProductExworkStdCost - Property ToolTip
Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control ProductExworkStdCost - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the general costs calculated from product standard costs.
trans-unit.note: Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control ProductGeneralCosts - Property ToolTip
Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control ProductGeneralCosts - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the profit calculated from product standard costs.
trans-unit.note: Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control ProductProfit - Property ToolTip
Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control ProductProfit - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the profit percentage calculated from product standard costs.
trans-unit.note: Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control ProductProfitPct - Property ToolTip
Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control ProductProfitPct - Property Caption
Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control Lines - Property Caption
Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control AdditionalFixedCost - Property ToolTip
Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control AdditionalFixedCost - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the additional standard cost calculated from product costs.
trans-unit.note: Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control AdditionalProductCost - Property ToolTip
Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control AdditionalProductCost - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether this cost applies on top of all other costs.
trans-unit.note: Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control ApplyOnAllCost - Property ToolTip
Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control ApplyOnAllCost - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the description of the cost.
trans-unit.note: Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control CostDescription - Property ToolTip
Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control CostDescription - Property Caption
Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control CostNo - Property ToolTip
Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control CostNo - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the type of cost (% or EUR).
trans-unit.note: Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control CostType - Property ToolTip
Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control CostType - Property Caption
Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control CostValue - Property ToolTip
Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control CostValue - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the updated profit for this cost line.
trans-unit.note: Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control LineProfit - Property ToolTip
Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control LineProfit - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the updated profit percentage for this cost line.
trans-unit.note: Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control LineProfitPct - Property ToolTip
Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Control LineProfitPct - Property Caption
Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Action ActionGroup - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Add additional costs from a cost template.
trans-unit.note: Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Action AddCostFromTemplate - Property ToolTip
Page CP BOM Aditional Cost - Action AddCostFromTemplate - Property Caption
Page CP Recipe Fluctuation Setup - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: This will create baseline entries for all non-blocked recipes. Do you want to continue?
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Fluctuation Setup - NamedType ConfirmCreateInitialQst

trans-unit.source: Initial entries have been created successfully.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Fluctuation Setup - NamedType InitialEntriesCreatedMsg

trans-unit.source: You do not have access to the Recipe Fluctuation Setup. Contact your administrator to enable the "Fluctuation Setup Access" field in User Setup.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Fluctuation Setup - NamedType NoAccessErr
Page CP Recipe Fluctuation Setup - Control General - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the email account used to send fluctuation notifications.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Fluctuation Setup - Control EmailAccountName - Property ToolTip
Page CP Recipe Fluctuation Setup - Control EmailAccountName - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies a custom email subject for fluctuation notifications. Leave empty to use the default subject.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Fluctuation Setup - Control EmailSubject - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date and time of the last recipe fluctuation processing run.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Fluctuation Setup - Control LastRunDate - Property ToolTip
Page CP Recipe Fluctuation Setup - Control Recipients - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the action to create baseline entries for all non-blocked recipes. Use this after first setup.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Fluctuation Setup - Action CreateInitialEntries - Property ToolTip
Page CP Recipe Fluctuation Setup - Action CreateInitialEntries - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the action to open the list of recipe price fluctuations.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Fluctuation Setup - Action OpenFluctuationList - Property ToolTip
Page CP Recipe Fluctuation Setup - Action OpenFluctuationList - Property Caption
Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: This will create baseline entries for all non-blocked recipes. Do you want to continue?
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - NamedType ConfirmCreateInitialQst

trans-unit.source: This will recalculate the standard cost for all non-blocked recipes and detect price fluctuations. Do you want to continue?
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - NamedType ConfirmProcessAllQst

trans-unit.source: Initial entries have been created successfully.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - NamedType InitialEntriesCreatedMsg
Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - NamedType ProcessCompleteMsg

trans-unit.source: Specifies the current BOM total cost at the time of detection.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control CurrentBOMTotalCost - Property ToolTip
Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control CurrentBOMTotalCost - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the current EXWORK standard cost at the time of detection.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control CurrentEXWORK - Property ToolTip
Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control CurrentEXWORK - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the current general costs (excluding profit) at the time of detection.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control CurrentGeneralCosts - Property ToolTip
Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control CurrentGeneralCosts - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the current profit amount at the time of detection.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control CurrentProfit - Property ToolTip
Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control CurrentProfit - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the current profit percentage at the time of detection.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control CurrentProfitPct - Property ToolTip
Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control CurrentProfitPct - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the current standard cost after recalculation.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control CurrentStandardCost - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date and time when the fluctuation was detected.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control DetectionDate - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the unique entry number for this fluctuation record.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control EntryNo - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the error message if the cost recalculation failed.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control ErrorText - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies an external link (URL or file path) for documents or photos related to this fluctuation.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control ExternalLink - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the user who fixed the recipe cost.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control FixedBy - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date and time when the recipe was fixed.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control FixedDate - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the difference between the previous and current standard cost.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control FluctuationAmount - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the BOM components that caused the cost fluctuation.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control FluctuationItems - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the fluctuation as a percentage of the previous standard cost.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control FluctuationPct - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether an error occurred during cost recalculation for this recipe.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control HasError - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the description of the item.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control ItemDescription - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the item number of the recipe with the price fluctuation.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control ItemNo - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number series of the item.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control ItemNoSeries - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether an email notification was sent for this fluctuation.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control NotificationSent - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the standard cost before the fluctuation was detected.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control PreviousStandardCost - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether the recipe cost has been fixed. Checking this will recalculate and fix the standard cost.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control RecipeFixed - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the lot size of the recipe at the time of detection.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control RecipeLot - Property ToolTip
Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control RecipeLot - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the statistics lot of the recipe at the time of detection.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control StatisticsLot - Property ToolTip
Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control StatisticsLot - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the statistics lot with unit of measure.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control StatisticsLotUoM - Property ToolTip
Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control StatisticsLotUoM - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the base unit of measure of the recipe.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control UnitOfMeasure - Property ToolTip
Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Control UnitOfMeasure - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the action to create baseline entries for all non-blocked recipes. Use this after first setup.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Action CreateInitialEntries - Property ToolTip
Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Action CreateInitialEntries - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the action to open the recipe card for the selected item.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Action OpenRecipe - Property ToolTip
Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Action OpenRecipe - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the action to open the recipe fluctuation setup.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Action OpenSetup - Property ToolTip
Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Action OpenSetup - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the action to recalculate costs for all non-blocked recipes and detect fluctuations.
trans-unit.note: Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Action ProcessAllRecipes - Property ToolTip
Page CP Recipe Price Fluctuation L. - Action ProcessAllRecipes - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the direct unit cost after applying the discount.

trans-unit.note: Page WS Purchase Prices - Control AGRALANombreProveedor - Property ToolTip
Page WS Purchase Prices - Control AGRALANombreProveedor - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the minimum quantity of the item that you must buy from the vendor in order to get the purchase price.
trans-unit.note: Page WS Purchase Prices - Control Cantidad minima - Property ToolTip
Page WS Purchase Prices - Control Cantidad minima - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the cost of one unit of the selected item or resource.
trans-unit.note: Page WS Purchase Prices - Control Costo unitario - Property ToolTip
Page WS Purchase Prices - Control Costo unitario - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the currency code of the purchase price.

Page WS Purchase Prices - Control Cód. Divisa - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured.

trans-unit.source: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

Page WS Purchase Prices - Control Definicion - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.note: Page WS Purchase Prices - Control Fecha fin - Property ToolTip
Page WS Purchase Prices - Control Fecha fin - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date from which the purchase price is valid.
trans-unit.note: Page WS Purchase Prices - Control Fecha inicio - Property ToolTip
Page WS Purchase Prices - Control Fecha inicio - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies if this is the best vendor for this item.
trans-unit.note: Page WS Purchase Prices - Control Mejor Proveedor - Property ToolTip
Page WS Purchase Prices - Control Mejor Proveedor - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of the item that the purchase price applies to.
trans-unit.note: Page WS Purchase Prices - Control N° Producto - Property ToolTip
Page WS Purchase Prices - Control N° Producto - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of the vendor who offers the line discount on the item.

Page WS Purchase Prices - Control N° Proveedor - Property Caption

Report Event Budget - Control Options - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether billing data is included in the report.
trans-unit.note: Report Event Budget - Control ShowBillingDataField - Property ToolTip
Report Event Budget - Control ShowBillingDataField - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether comments are included in the report.
trans-unit.note: Report Event Budget - Control ShowCommentsField - Property ToolTip
Report Event Budget - Control ShowCommentsField - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether the form of contract and payment section is shown in the report.
trans-unit.note: Report Event Budget - Control ShowFormOfContractField - Property ToolTip
Report Event Budget - Control ShowFormOfContractField - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether the greeting text section is shown in the report.

Report Event Budget - Control ShowGreetingTextField - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether the second observations section is shown in the report.

Report Event Budget - Control ShowObservations2Field - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether the first observations section is shown in the report.

Report Event Budget - Control ShowObservationsField - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Indicates whether to show the hot elaboration quantity in the report.
trans-unit.note: Report Receip Part - Control VarElaboracionCaliente - Property ToolTip
Report Receip Part - Control VarElaboracionCaliente - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Indica si se desean mostrar los recursos en el informe.
trans-unit.note: Report Receip Part - Control VarMostrarRecursos - Property ToolTip
Report Receip Part - Control VarMostrarRecursos - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Run the production part report for this assembly order.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Assembly Order - Action CPProductionPart - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Assembly Order - Action CPProductionPart - Property Caption
PageExtension Assembly Order - Control ElaborationGroup - Property Caption
PageExtension Assembly Order - Control ElaborationField - Property Caption
PageExtension BOM Aditional Cost OLD - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Do you want to set this vendor as the best for item %1? There is currently another vendor marked as the best.
trans-unit.note: %1 = Item No.
PageExtension CP Purchase Price List Lines - NamedType ConfirmQst

trans-unit.source: Displays the name of the vendor.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension CP Purchase Price List Lines - Control Vendor Name - Property ToolTip
PageExtension CP Purchase Price List Lines - Control Vendor Name - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Displays the search name of the vendor.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension CP Purchase Price List Lines - Control Vendor Search Name - Property ToolTip
PageExtension CP Purchase Price List Lines - Control Vendor Search Name - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Indicates if the vendor is the best option for this item.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension CP Purchase Price List Lines - Control Best Vendor - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Additional comments regarding the price list line.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension CP Purchase Price List Lines - Control Comments - Property ToolTip
PageExtension CP Purchase Price List Lines - Control Comments - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Displays the unit price after applying the line discount percentage.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension CP Purchase Price List Lines - Control Net Unit Price - Property ToolTip
PageExtension CP Purchase Price List Lines - Control Net Unit Price - Property Caption
PageExtension CP Purchase Price List Lines - Change Variant Code Lookup - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: This will update all supply costs and propagate changes to resources and work centers.\Do you want to continue?
trans-unit.note: PageExtension CP Supply List - NamedType ConfirmUpdateQst
PageExtension CP Supply List - NamedType FindingRecipesTxt

trans-unit.source: There are no supplies to update.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension CP Supply List - NamedType NoSuppliesToUpdateMsg
%1 = Supply No., %2 = Supply Description
PageExtension CP Supply List - NamedType ProcessingSupplyTxt
%1 = Recipe No.
PageExtension CP Supply List - NamedType RecalculatingRecipeTxt
%1 = Error recipe count, %2 = Recipe list with errors
PageExtension CP Supply List - NamedType SummaryFailedRecipesTxt

trans-unit.source: Update completed.\\Supplies processed: %1\Supply-resource records updated: %2\Resources updated: %3\Work center lines updated: %4
trans-unit.note: %1 = Total supplies, %2 = Supply-resource updated, %3 = Resources updated, %4 = Work center lines updated
PageExtension CP Supply List - NamedType SummaryHeaderTxt
%1 = Affected recipe count, %2 = Successfully recalculated recipe count
PageExtension CP Supply List - NamedType SummaryRecipesTxt
#1 = Current item text, @2 = Progress bar
PageExtension CP Supply List - NamedType UpdateProgressMsg
%1 = Resource Code
PageExtension CP Supply List - NamedType UpdatingResourceTxt

trans-unit.source: Updates all supply prices and propagates changes to resources and work center lines. Shows a progress indicator and a summary of all changes.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension CP Supply List - Action CPUpdateSupplyCosts - Property ToolTip
PageExtension CP Supply List - Action CPUpdateSupplyCosts - Property Caption
%1 = Event Code
PageExtension Ficha Evento - NamedType AttachmentFileNameLbl
%1 = Event Code, %2 = Event Description
PageExtension Ficha Evento - NamedType EmailBudgetSubjectLbl

trans-unit.source: The budget report could not be generated. Please try again.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Ficha Evento - NamedType ReportGenerationErr
PageExtension Ficha Evento - NamedType ReportTypeOptionsLbl

trans-unit.source: Select the report type to send:
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Ficha Evento - NamedType SelectReportTypeLbl

trans-unit.source: Print the event budget report with greeting text, observations and form of contract.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Ficha Evento - Action PrintBudget - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Ficha Evento - Action PrintBudget - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Print the event report with comments and observations.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Ficha Evento - Action PrintEventReport - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Ficha Evento - Action PrintEventReport - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Print the event components production sheet.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Ficha Evento - Action PrintProductionSheet - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Ficha Evento - Action PrintProductionSheet - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Print the event budget as a pro forma invoice with billing data and observations.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Ficha Evento - Action PrintProFormaInvoice - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Ficha Evento - Action PrintProFormaInvoice - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Generate the event budget report as PDF and open the email editor to send it.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Ficha Evento - Action SendBudgetByEmail - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Ficha Evento - Action SendBudgetByEmail - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Open the list of event types.

PageExtension Ficha Evento - Action EventTypes - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Unblock this product and all its BOM components recursively.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Item Card - Action Activate Product - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Item Card - Action Activate Product - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Create a copy of the current item with all its components and settings.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Item Card - Action Duplicate Item - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Item Card - Action Duplicate Item - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Shows the name of the vendor assigned to this item.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Item Card - Control Vendor Name - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Item Card - Control Vendor Name - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Unblock this product and all its BOM components recursively.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Item List - Action Activate Product - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Item List - Action Activate Product - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Create a copy of the current item with all its components and settings.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Item List - Action Duplicate Item - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Item List - Action Duplicate Item - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Indicates whether the item is blocked for use in transactions.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Item List - Control Block - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Item List - Control Block - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Run the production part report for this assembly order.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Posted Assembly Order - Action CPProductionPart - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Posted Assembly Order - Action CPProductionPart - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies a comment for this credit memo line.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Posted Sales Cr. Memo Subform - Control CP Comment - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies if this credit memo line is a return.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Posted Sales Cr. Memo Subform - Control CP Return - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Price List Line Review - NamedType ItemPriceDetailsHdrLbl
#333 and #fff are HTML hex color codes, not placeholders.
PageExtension Price List Line Review - NamedType TableHdrLbl
PageExtension Price List Line Review - NamedType TriggerVerifyLinesLbl

trans-unit.source: No se encontraron líneas en estado borrador con productos para procesar.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Price List Line Review - NamedType VerifyNoItemsMsg

trans-unit.source: Verificación completada. No se encontraron componentes de LM afectados por los productos modificados.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Price List Line Review - NamedType VerifyNoRecipesMsg

trans-unit.source: Proceso completado correctamente.\Se han actualizado %1 componentes de LM y recalculado %2 recetas.
trans-unit.note: %1 = Updated components, %2 = Processed recipes
PageExtension Price List Line Review - NamedType VerifySuccessMsg

trans-unit.source: Do you want to set this vendor as the best for item %1? There is currently another vendor marked as the best.
trans-unit.note: %1 = Item No.
PageExtension Price List Line Review - Method ValidateBestVendor - NamedType ConfirmQst

trans-unit.source: Opens the price list for the current line, filtering by the item.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Price List Line Review - Action OpenPriceListFiltered - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Price List Line Review - Action OpenPriceListFiltered - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Verifica líneas, activa borradores, sincroniza componentes de LM con Best Vendor y recalcula costes de recetas.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Price List Line Review - Action CPVerifyLines - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Price List Line Review - Action CPVerifyLines - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Displays the name of the vendor.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Price List Line Review - Control Vendor Name - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Price List Line Review - Control Vendor Name - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Displays the search name of the vendor.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Price List Line Review - Control Vendor Search Name - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Price List Line Review - Control Vendor Search Name - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Indicates if the vendor is the best option for this item.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Price List Line Review - Control Best Vendor - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Displays the calculated amount of discount based on the direct unit cost and line discount percentage.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Price List Line Review - Control Amount Discount - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Price List Line Review - Control Amount Discount - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Additional comments regarding the price list line.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Price List Line Review - Control Comments - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Price List Line Review - Change Variant Code - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the name of the customer.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Price List Lines - Control Customer Name - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Price List Lines - Control Customer Name - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the search name of the customer.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Price List Lines - Control Customer Search Name - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Price List Lines - Control Customer Search Name - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Muestra el precio neto propuesto de la lista de precios del Mejor Proveedor (con descuento aplicado).
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Purchase Order Subform - Control CP Proposed Price - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Purchase Order Subform - Control CP Proposed Price - Property Caption
PageExtension Purchase Price List - NamedType ClearFiltersLbl
PageExtension Purchase Price List - NamedType ItemPriceDetailsHdrLbl
#333 and #fff are HTML hex color codes, not placeholders.
PageExtension Purchase Price List - NamedType TableHdrLbl

trans-unit.source: Verificación de líneas de precios de compra
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Purchase Price List - NamedType TriggerVerifyLinesLbl

trans-unit.source: No se encontraron líneas en estado borrador con productos para procesar.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Purchase Price List - NamedType VerifyNoItemsMsg

trans-unit.source: Verificación completada. No se encontraron componentes de LM afectados por los productos modificados.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Purchase Price List - NamedType VerifyNoRecipesMsg

trans-unit.source: Proceso completado correctamente.\Se han actualizado %1 componentes de LM y recalculado %2 recetas.
trans-unit.note: %1 = Updated components, %2 = Processed recipes
PageExtension Purchase Price List - NamedType VerifySuccessMsg

trans-unit.source: Verifica líneas, activa borradores, sincroniza componentes de LM con Best Vendor y recalcula costes de recetas.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Purchase Price List - Action CPVerifyLines - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Purchase Price List - Action CPVerifyLines - Property Caption
PageExtension Purchase Price List - Control Filters - Property Caption
PageExtension Purchase Price List - Control ClearFilters - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies a filter for which purchase prices to display.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Purchase Price List - Control FilterItemNo - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Purchase Price List - Control FilterItemNo - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies a filter for which purchase prices to display.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Purchase Price List - Control FilterVendorNo - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Purchase Price List - Control FilterVendorNo - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while recalculating the standard cost.\Error: %1
trans-unit.note: %1 = Error message
PageExtension Receta - NamedType CalcStdCostErrorMsg

trans-unit.source: The standard cost has been recalculated and updated successfully.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Receta - NamedType CalcStdCostSuccessMsg

trans-unit.source: This will recalculate the standard cost and update all fixed additional costs for the recipe. Do you want to continue?
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Receta - NamedType ConfirmCalcStdCostQst
PageExtension Receta - NamedType FluctComponentsHdrLbl
#333 and #fff are HTML hex color codes, not placeholders.
PageExtension Receta - NamedType TableHdrLbl
%1 = Item No., %2 = Item Description
PageExtension Receta - NamedType TriggerRecipeLbl
PageExtension Receta - Action ReceiptPartAction - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Receta - Action ReceiptPartAction - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the action to recalculate the standard cost from BOM components and update the fixed additional costs.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Receta - Action CalculateStandardCostAction - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Receta - Action CalculateStandardCostAction - Property Caption
PageExtension Receta - Action ItemListAction - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Receta - Action ItemListAction - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies where this item is used.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Receta - Action PointsOfUseAction - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Receta - Action PointsOfUseAction - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the price fluctuation history for this recipe.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Receta - Action PriceFluctuationAction - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Receta - Action PriceFluctuationAction - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the action to recalculate the standard batch size for this recipe.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Receta - Action RecalculateRecipeBatchAction - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Receta - Action RecalculateRecipeBatchAction - Property Caption
PageExtension Receta - Action ResourceListAction - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Receta - Action ResourceListAction - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the supply list for this item.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Receta - Action SupplyListAction - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Receta - Action SupplyListAction - Property Caption
PageExtension Receta - Action WorkCenterAction - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Receta - Action WorkCenterAction - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the statistics lot for this recipe.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Receta - Control StatisticsLotDisplay - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Receta - Control StatisticsLotDisplay - Property Caption
PageExtension Receta - Control BOMVersionInfo - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the latest version number of the Bill of Materials (BOM) for this recipe.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Receta - Control LatestBOMVersionNo - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Receta - Control LatestBOMVersionNo - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the total gross weight in kilograms from BOM components.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Receta - Control TotalGrossWeightField - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Receta - Control TotalGrossWeightField - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the total net weight in kilograms from BOM components.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Receta - Control TotalNetWeightField - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Receta - Control TotalNetWeightField - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the comment of the latest BOM version.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Receta - Control VersionComment - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Receta - Control VersionComment - Property Caption
PageExtension Receta - Control BOMAdditionalCostPart - Property Caption
PageExtension Receta - Control ElaborationGroup - Property Caption
PageExtension Receta - Control ElaborationField - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies a comment for this credit memo line.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Sales Cr. Memo Subform - Control CP Comment - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies if this credit memo line is a return.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Sales Cr. Memo Subform - Control CP Return - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Sales Price List - NamedType ClearFiltersLbl
PageExtension Sales Price List - Control Filters - Property Caption
PageExtension Sales Price List - Control ClearFilters - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies a filter for which sales prices to display.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Sales Price List - Control FilterCustomerNo - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Sales Price List - Control FilterCustomerNo - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies a filter for which sales prices to display.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Sales Price List - Control FilterItemNo - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Sales Price List - Control FilterItemNo - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: This will update the costs for work center %1 - %2 and recalculate all affected recipes.\Do you want to continue?
trans-unit.note: %1 = Work Center No., %2 = Work Center Description
PageExtension Work Center Doc. List - NamedType ConfirmUpdateQst
PageExtension Work Center Doc. List - NamedType FindingRecipesTxt

trans-unit.source: \\No recipes are affected by this work center.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Work Center Doc. List - NamedType NoAffectedRecipesTxt

trans-unit.source: Refreshing resource costs for work center %1...
trans-unit.note: %1 = Work Center No.
PageExtension Work Center Doc. List - NamedType Phase1Txt
%1 = Recipe No., %2 = Current, %3 = Total
PageExtension Work Center Doc. List - NamedType ProcessingRecipeTxt
PageExtension Work Center Doc. List - NamedType ResourceTypeLbl
%1 = Error count
PageExtension Work Center Doc. List - NamedType SummaryErrorsTxt

trans-unit.source: Update completed for work center %1 - %2.\\Resources updated: %3\Work center lines updated: %4\Recipe BOM quantities updated: %5\New work center total cost: %6
trans-unit.note: %1 = WC No., %2 = WC Description, %3 = Resources updated, %4 = WCL updated, %5 = BOM quantities updated, %6 = New total cost
PageExtension Work Center Doc. List - NamedType SummaryHeaderTxt
%1 = Recipe count, %2 = Recipe list
PageExtension Work Center Doc. List - NamedType SummaryRecipesTxt

trans-unit.source: Syncing quantities from work center lines to recipes...
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Work Center Doc. List - NamedType SyncingQuantitiesTxt
#333 and #fff are HTML hex color codes, not placeholders.
PageExtension Work Center Doc. List - NamedType TableHdrLbl
%1 = Work Center No., %2 = Work Center Description
PageExtension Work Center Doc. List - NamedType TriggerWorkCenterLbl
#1 = Current step text, @2 = Progress bar
PageExtension Work Center Doc. List - NamedType UpdateProgressMsg
PageExtension Work Center Doc. List - NamedType WorkCenterChangesHdrLbl
PageExtension Work Center Doc. List - NamedType WorkCenterLineTypeLbl

trans-unit.source: Updates resources costs from supply data, refreshes work center lines, and recalculates all affected recipes.
trans-unit.note: PageExtension Work Center Doc. List - Action CPUpdateWorkCenter - Property ToolTip
PageExtension Work Center Doc. List - Action CPUpdateWorkCenter - Property Caption

TableExtension Evento - Field Form of Contract and Payment - Property Caption

TableExtension Evento - Field Observations Text 1 - Property Caption
TableExtension Evento - Field Observations Text 2 - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Do you want to load the text template from event type "%1"?
trans-unit.note: %1 = Event Type Description
TableExtension Evento - Change Tipo Evento - Method OnAfterValidate - NamedType LoadTemplateQst

trans-unit.source: The event already has greeting and/or observation texts.\\Do you want to overwrite them with the event type template?
trans-unit.note: TableExtension Evento - Change Tipo Evento - Method OnAfterValidate - NamedType OverwriteWarningQst

trans-unit.source: You cannot modify the elaboration of recipe %1 because its status is %2. Set the recipe to 'Under Construction' to edit it.
trans-unit.note: %1 = Item No., %2 = Status LM value
TableExtension Item - NamedType CannotEditElaborationCertifiedErr
TableExtension Item - Field Elaboration - Property Caption

TableExtension Price List Line - Field Comments - Property Caption

TableExtension Tipo de Evento - Field Observations Text - Property Caption

Enum Fluctuation Recipient Type - Property Caption
Enum Fluctuation Recipient Type - EnumValue CA - Property Caption

Enum Fluctuation Recipient Type - EnumValue PT - Property Caption
PermissionSet CP Base - Property Caption
